name: Ether.fi ARM
redeem: ARM shares exit through a two-step onchain redemption: requestRedeem, then claimRedeem when claimable. If vault liquidity is available, claims may be available after a 10 minute delay; otherwise redemptions remain pending until liquidity returns. Large withdrawals can take 7-15 days because eETH is redeemed through Ether.fi's asynchronous unstaking process.
notes: Non-rebasing vault share token for Origin's eETH/WETH ARM. Strategy buys discounted eETH, redeems via Ether.fi, and routes idle WETH to Morpho. Use onchain share conversion for valuation; not 1:1 with ETH.
